 878 |     def _mark_stale_for_written_file(self, file_path: str) -> None:
 879 |         """文件写入后标记相关 anchored 记忆为 stale。"""
 880 |         if not self._memory_context or not self._memory_context.enabled:
 881 |             return
 882 |         store = getattr(self._memory_context, "store", None)
 883 |         if store is None:
 884 |             return
 885 |         try:
 886 |             count = store.mark_stale_for_file(file_path)
 887 |             if count:
 888 |                 logger.debug("Marked %d memories stale for file: %s", count, file_path)
 889 |         except Exception as exc:
 890 |             logger.debug("mark_stale_for_file skipped: %s", exc)
